name: imperium-twilight-of-empires
description: IMPERIUM: Twilight of Empires — a browser strategy game set in the late Roman/Byzantine world (~1400–1453).

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @imperium/shared && npm run build --workspace @imperium/server && npm run build --workspace @imperium/client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @imperium/server" "npm run dev --workspace @imperium/client"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @imperium/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @imperium/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @imperium/client
